falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal, indicating a trend reversal not accounted for by the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 300% above the 20-day average on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a blowoff top or extreme market conviction, invalidating the HOLD by showing a clear directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes below the key support level identified in the bottom_2024_aug pattern by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown of the support level would falsify the pattern match, proving the current HOLD verdict incorrect by showing a failure of the expected bottom structure.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
